events.name: dust_storm
events.description: The worst dust storm in decades buries the southern airlock.

events.name: cave_discovery
events.description: Underground cavern with stable temperature discovered.

events.name: colonist_conflict
events.description: Accusations of resource hoarding fracture the colony trust.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))

governance.rationale: Elect a council of 5 for 10 years.

meta_awareness.insight: Aura Kai notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.

memories.event: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.
Earth directive: Earth orders colony to adopt appointed governor model.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.

A bitter dispute over food rationing escalates to shouting.
Fine Martian regolith clogs air filters and reduces solar output.
